title: Protein Expression
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"31o9l","text":"The protein expression is a process about synthesizing and modification for proteins in living","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"crft9","text":"organisms with using several laboratory techniques and devices. This technique is generally","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7o30n","text":"used for obtaining protein from the competent cell that is used for carrying plasmids that possess","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"414o8","text":"the protein that we want to express.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"do1vu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"48v22","text":"Protein expression involves two general steps that;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":51}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dpikh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"30nl3","text":"• Gene expression; which is continuum that converting DNA to the mRNA that can be","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b8tb6","text":"translate into protein.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"edb0o","text":"• Protein manufacturing; which is translation process.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Undetermined LB Broth Amresco Catalog #J106-2KG undetermined, LB undetermined, Ampicillin
In this step 35 µl of total sample should be obtained. Binding Buffer involves 5 ml Imidazole, 20 ml TBS, ddw up to 200 ml.
For sonication, plastic test tubes are usually used for sonication. This sonication process is done at 3 cycles for 7 minutes. 00:07:00, Sonication for 1 cycle. Repeat this step for 3 times total.
